blended.narrative: Plattekill Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 57°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
